name: _diag_SetupChannelRequest, _diag_SetupChannelReq
title: _diag_SetupChannelRequest, _diag_SetupChannelReq
description: With this function the CAPL program of a tester implementation will be requested to open a channel to the ECU. After opening the channel the CAPL program can call the function diag_SetupChannelCon.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Qualifier of the ECU to open a channel to.
